pi_items.source: Web search confirmed VistA File 3.8 is the Mail Group file and is stored in ^XMB(3.8).
verifier.py checks if unique_matches >= 10 and maxes out content score at 10 matches.
verifier.py explicitly adds 10 for infrastructure, 10 for file validity, max 45 for content accuracy, and 35 for VLM check.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic VistA VEHU database. The target global for Mail Groups is ^XMB(3.8), which matches the standard VistA file number 3.8. The agent must create an output file at /home/ga/Documents/mail_groups_audit.txt containing at least 10 valid mail group names. Scoring weights are explicitly verified in verifier.py as infrastructure (10), report file (10), VLM navigation check (35), and content accuracy (45).
